title: Volume: Single-Bar Reading

studentTask: Write a short VSA reading in five lines: background, level, bar evidence, confirmation, and invalidation. Keep the explanation simple and do not predict with certainty.
idealAnswer: The strongest answer explains that volume is judged relative to recent bars, not as an isolated number.
